{"id":595,"date":"2026-07-06T22:49:09","date_gmt":"2026-07-06T22:49:09","guid":{"rendered":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/?page_id=595"},"modified":"2026-07-06T22:49:09","modified_gmt":"2026-07-06T22:49:09","slug":"disclaimer","status":"publish","type":"page","link":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/disclaimer\/","title":{"rendered":"Disclaimer"},"content":{"rendered":"\n

beesayatv is an independent field documentation project that records trails, natural areas, and related observations in Cebu through on-site visits.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

The information published on this website reflects observations made at the time of documentation. Trail conditions, weather, vegetation, land ownership, access arrangements, infrastructure, hazards, and applicable regulations may change without notice.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Content on beesayatv is provided for informational and documentary purposes only. It should not be interpreted as a guarantee of current trail conditions, access, safety, or legality. Visitors are responsible for making their own decisions, verifying current information where appropriate, obtaining any required permissions, and complying with applicable laws, local regulations, and property rights.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Personal articles, journals, and field notes represent the author’s experiences and observations from specific visits. They are not intended as medical, psychological, legal, professional, or safety advice. Individual experiences and circumstances may differ.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Links to third-party websites, organizations, or mapping services are provided for convenience only. Their content, availability, and accuracy are outside the control of beesayatv.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

While reasonable efforts are made to document locations accurately, no warranty or guarantee is made regarding the completeness, accuracy, or continued availability of any information published on this website.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

By using this website, you acknowledge that any decisions based on its content are your own responsibility.<\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"

beesayatv is an independent field documentation project that records trails, natural areas, and related observations in Cebu through on-site visits. The information published on this website reflects observations made at the time of documentation.
